channel.title: Experience on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Experience on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer

item.title: 6sense: From Hackathons to AI Pipelines
item.description: A 4.5-year journey scaling frontend architectures, merging acquisitions, building big data pipelines, and shipping Generative AI infrastructure.

item.title: OrangeSomething — Founding Engineer at a Blinkit-Incubated D2C Brand
item.description: Led the full tech stack for a D2C beauty platform incubated at Blinkit — migrated from Shopify to React (12s → 3s load) and built a native Android app.

item.title: Ape Unit — Blockchain Explorer & Team Building in Berlin
item.description: Led development of a blockchain explorer for the Aeternity network and managed a new tech team of four developers across India and Berlin.
